nasb.text: and if He rescued righteous Lot, oppressed by the sensual conduct of unprincipled men

esv.text: and if he rescued righteous Lot, greatly distressed by the sensual conduct of the wicked

cnv.text: 只救了那因惡人的淫行而常受委屈的義人羅得；

ccb.text: 祂只拯救了因恶人的淫乱放荡而忧伤的义人罗得，

csbs.text: 既然神拯救了那因恶人的好色行为而哀伤的义人罗得——
